creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sbz
Date: Tue Aug 14 11:35:29 2012
New Revision: 302518
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302518

Log:
  - Update to 0.7.7
  
  PR:		ports/168667
  Submitted by:	koobs <koobs.freebsd@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (>14 days)

Modified:
  head/net/py-netaddr/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/py-netaddr/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/py-netaddr/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/net/py-netaddr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-netaddr/Makefile	Tue Aug 14 11:08:15 2012	(r302517)
+++ head/net/py-netaddr/Makefile	Tue Aug 14 11:35:29 2012	(r302518)
@@ -6,14 +6,14 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	netaddr
-PORTVERSION=	0.7.6
+PORTVERSION=	0.7.7
 CATEGORIES=	net python
 MASTER_SITES=	https://github.com/drkjam/${PORTNAME}/downloads/ \
 		CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	yzlin@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A python library for the manipulation of network address manipulation
+COMMENT=	A python library for the manipulation of network addresses
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
